qwen3_query_instruction: Retrieve scenes from Brazilian-Portuguese audiovisual transcripts that best match the described event, dialogue, character, emotion, intention, or narrative context.
e5_query_instruction: Given a Brazilian-Portuguese scene-retrieval query, retrieve the transcript passages that best answer it.
notes: Colibri usa encode_query e encode_document do próprio SentenceTransformer. E5 e Qwen3 recebem instrução manual na consulta. BGE-M3 usa texto sem prefixo. BitNet permanece experimental por ausência de model card detalhado.
